Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF National Death Index Segment Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 2.6 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) 
— National Death Index (NDI) Segment research files. The guide includes several ways for users to quickly find the 
information they need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based on
